clips.title: High Noon
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, western, dusty grade. A deserted frontier town main street at high noon, weathered wooden storefronts, dust drifting. Harsh midday sun. A cowboy shot framing a person from mid-thigh up, standing squared to camera, hand resting near a holstered belt, coat still. A person in western wear, hat, and a gun belt. Hard warm light, drifting dust, 40mm, cowboy shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Rancher
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, western, warm grade. A ranch at golden hour, a wooden fence, rolling pasture and distant hills behind. Evening, warm. A cowboy shot framing a person from mid-thigh up, leaning one hand on the fence post, relaxed and weathered. A person in a work shirt, jeans, and a wide-brim hat. Warm golden light, long shadows, 40mm, cowboy shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Saloon
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, western, moody grade. The swinging doors of an old saloon, warm lamplight spilling from inside, dusty boardwalk. Evening. A cowboy shot framing a person from mid-thigh up, standing in the saloon doorway, one hand on the door, surveying the room. A person in a duster coat, vest, and hat. Warm interior glow, cool dusk outside, 40mm, cowboy shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Drifter
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, gritty grade. A neon-lit urban alley at night, wet asphalt, a motorcycle parked behind. Night. A cowboy shot framing a person from mid-thigh up, standing squared to camera, thumbs hooked in their belt, confident. A person in a leather jacket, boots, and jeans. Cool neon spill, wet reflections, 40mm, cowboy shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Canyon
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, western, epic grade. A red-rock desert canyon, towering mesas and warm stone behind, scrub brush. Late afternoon, warm. A cowboy shot framing a person from mid-thigh up, standing firm against the canyon, coat stirring in the wind. A person in a poncho, hat, and gun belt. Warm golden light, dramatic rock, 40mm, cowboy shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Sheriff
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, western, warm grade. The porch of a frontier sheriff's office at sunset, wooden posts, a hanging lantern, the town beyond. Evening, warm. A cowboy shot framing a person from mid-thigh up, standing on the porch, hand near a badge on their vest, watchful. A person in a vest, hat, and a star badge. Warm sunset light, long shadows, 40mm, cowboy shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
